title: Ronnie O'Sullivan: The Edge of Everything
original_title: Ronnie O'Sullivan: The Edge of Everything
overview: Ronnie O’Sullivan hasn’t had the most harmonious relationship with the media over the years, but his attempt to win the Snooker World Championship for a record 7th time in 2021 apparently proved too good an opportunity to pass up.
